# hrobot_storagebox_subaccounts (Data Source)

List all sub-accounts of a Hetzner Storage Box.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_storagebox_subaccounts" "example" {
  storagebox_id = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `storagebox_id` (Number) Storage Box ID.

### Read-Only

- `subaccounts` (Attributes List) All sub-accounts of the Storage Box. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subaccounts))

<a id="nestedatt--subaccounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subaccounts`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String) Sub-account ID.
- `comment` (String) Free-form comment.
- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `external_reachability` (Boolean) Whether the sub-account is externally reachable.
- `home_directory` (String) Home directory of the sub-account.
- `readonly` (Boolean) Whether the sub-account is read-only.
- `samba` (Boolean) Whether Samba/CIFS is enabled.
- `server` (String) Hostname clients connect to.
- `ssh` (Boolean) Whether SSH is enabled.
- `username` (String) Sub-account username.
- `webdav` (Boolean) Whether WebDAV is enabled.
